remarks: ***Limited time special! *1 MONTH FREE RENT when you sign a 13-month lease for an August 1st (or sooner) start date. *$1,000 security if all applicants have 700+ credit score & qualify financially. Does not apply if a co-signer is needed. *1 parking space is free, second parking space is $75/month and 1 free storage space for 1 year (after that, storage will be $50 for the smaller units and $75 for the larger ones)***. Under new ownership and management! Welcome to Hamilton Gardens - a pet friendly, charming garden-style community ideally located in Stamford's sought-after Glenbrook neighborhood. This beautifully maintained 2-bedrooms, 1-bathroom unit offers spacious, light-filled living and classic appeal with a generously sized living room, dining room, kitchen with a door leading out to your outdoor space, perfect for home cooking or entertaining. This unit blends comfort and functionality, boasting hardwood floors and ample closet space throughout. Community amenities include on-site laundry and peaceful courtyard settings. Conveniently located just minutes from Cove Island Park, Chelsea Piers, shopping, dining, and I-95 for a quick commute. Heat, hot & cold water, and trash collection are included in the rent.
